fields.name: Bulbasaur
fields.description: its back right from the day this Pokémon is born. The seed slowly grows larger.

fields.name: Charmander
fields.description: It has a preference for hot things. When it rains, steam is said to spout from the tip of its tail.

fields.name: Charizard
fields.description: It spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. It may cause forest fires by blowing flames.

fields.name: Squirtle
fields.description: When it retracts its long neck into its shell, it squirts out water with vigorous force.

fields.name: Pidgeot
fields.description: This Pokémon flies at Mach 2 speed, seeking prey. Its large talons are feared as wicked weapons.
